---
title: "Analysis"
author: "naiadllc"
date: "`r format(Sys.Date(), '%B %d, %Y')`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    number_sections: true
    code_folding: show
    theme: cosmo
    df_print: paged
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = TRUE,
  message = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE,
  fig.align = "center",
  fig.width = 8,
  fig.height = 5,
  dpi = 150
)
```

# Overview

Describe the purpose of this analysis here: the question you're answering,
the data you're using, and the headline findings.

# Setup

```{r libraries}
# Load packages here as you add them, e.g.:
# library(tidyverse)
```

# Data

```{r load-data}
# Read your data here, e.g.:
# data <- readr::read_csv("data/raw/example.csv")
```

# Exploration

```{r explore}
# Summaries, plots, and sanity checks go here.
```

# Analysis

```{r analysis}
# Core analysis goes here.
```

# Results

Summarize the results and what they mean.

# Session info

```{r session-info}
sessionInfo()
```
